description: CompositionBlack kurta made of a blended fabric, has a V-neck with sequins and beading around the neckline, three quarter sleeves with asymmetric cuffs and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold water using a mild detergentCrafted from soft fabric, this kurta from aneri is sure to offer exemplary comfort. Team it with leggings, sandals and chunky ethnic earrings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
